productName: Fruit Burst Vibes - Strawberry Tsunami 50:1 CBD:THC 510mg
description: Soft, nostalgic chews with a caramel-shop texture, handmade-candy energy, and a smooth cannabis infusion blended right into the recipe. It blends CBD to keep things calm and balanced and THC for a classic euphoric lift in a 50:1 ratio. A dessert-style hybrid treat with the kind of flavor that makes dosing feel like a reward.
